chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 415 of 2024 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of CMA No.1992/2024 2. For hearing of main case 22.04.2025 Mr. Furqan Mushtaque, advocate for the petitioner Ms. Mehreen Ibrahim, Deputy Attorney General Mr. Sharjeel Wassan, Assistant Collector, JIAP, Collectorate Karachi Mr. Sharjeel Wassan, Assistant Collector, JIAP, Collectorate Karachi, is present in person and states that the impugned demand notice is being withdrawn forthwith, subject to the right of the department to initiate any proceedings as may be permissible under the law. In view hereof learned counsel for the petitioner states that the petition has served its purpose, hence, may be disposed of. Order accordingly. The contempt notice is discharged. The presence and assistance of learned officer is appreciated. Judge Judge Amjad
